footer.tagline: The infrastructure layer for global sports markets. Exchange-grade technology powering next-generation trading.

home.heroSubtitle: Exchange technology, professional liquidity, and programmable APIs for next-generation sports trading.
home.pillarsSubtitle: Purpose-built for professional market participants and exchange operators worldwide.
home.pillarLiquidityDesc: Tight spreads and deep order books from professional market makers and institutional sources.
home.pillarTechDesc: Deterministic matching engine with low-latency execution and real-time risk controls.
home.pillarWhiteLabelDesc: Deploy a branded exchange in weeks — UI, settlement, risk tools, and commissions included.
home.clientsSubtitle: Exchange-grade infrastructure, deep liquidity, and programmable access for institutions and professionals.
home.clientMakersDesc: High-performance APIs, competitive fee tiers, and co-location ready.
home.clientExchangesDesc: Full branding control, settlement, and risk management.
home.clientDataDesc: Sports data integration, real-time feeds, and predictive analytics.
home.clientTradersDesc: Professional execution, advanced order types, and transparent access.
home.archSubtitle: Deterministic execution with crash recovery and zero order loss.
home.archFeature1: Low-latency order book with price-time priority
home.archFeature3: Real-time risk controls and position management
home.archFeature4: gRPC API with full market and order access
home.ctaSubtitle: Explore API access, liquidity partnerships, or white-label deployment with our team.

about.heroTitle: Build the Engine That Powers Global
about.heroSubtitle: Market infrastructure powering professional sports trading exchanges worldwide.
about.missionTitle: Powering the Future of Sports Trading
about.missionSubtitle: Critical infrastructure for creating, accessing, and trading sports markets at institutional grade.
about.visionDesc: The exchange that powers exchanges — underlying technology and liquidity for operators worldwide.
about.journeyTitle: From Trading Expertise to Market Infrastructure
about.timelineFoundationDesc: Two decades of exchange trading experience brought to institutional sports market infrastructure.
about.timelineEvolutionDesc: Pricing models, real-time feeds, and predictive analytics powering accurate market creation.
about.timelineTodayDesc: Mature platform serving global operators — matching, settlement, and risk management, continuously refined.
about.groupSubtitle: Three integrated verticals forming a cohesive exchange infrastructure platform.
about.groupDataDesc: Real-time feeds, historical databases, and predictive modelling.
about.groupTechDesc: Matching engine, risk systems, API platform, and operational tooling.
about.groupEngineDesc: Liquidity bridge, settlement engine, risk controls, and market creation tools.
about.valueIntegrityDesc: Transparent, accountable systems designed for fair, auditable markets.
about.valuePerformanceDesc: Latency, throughput, and reliability — optimised in everything we build.
about.valueInnovationDesc: Continuously evolving to meet market demands and operator needs.
about.valueGlobalDesc: Multi-region deployment with localisation, compliance, and infrastructure flexibility.
about.ctaSubtitle: Explore how IQEX infrastructure can power your exchange or market making activity.

technology.heroSubtitle: Institutional-grade matching, risk controls, and programmable APIs for professional participants.
technology.engineSubtitle: Price-time priority matching with complex order types and synthetic liquidity.
technology.engineOrderBookDesc: Full depth-of-market with synthetic liquidity via cross-runner algorithms.
technology.engineRecoveryDesc: Zero order loss across system restarts and failover events.
technology.engineThroughputDesc: Linear performance scaling under sustained order volumes.
technology.marketSubtitle: In-play markets, 15+ types, and custom market creation.
technology.marketInPlayDesc: Sub-second updates for live event trading across all sports verticals.
technology.marketTypesDesc: Match odds, handicaps, over/under, correct score, and custom markets.
technology.marketCustomDesc: Programmatic and agent-requested creation for niche events and prediction markets.
technology.apiSubtitle: gRPC API and sandbox environments for rapid, reliable integration.
technology.apiGrpcDesc: Binary protocol for orders, markets, and account management.
technology.apiSandboxDesc: Full test environment with simulated market data.
technology.apiIdempotencyDesc: Safe retry semantics for all mutating operations.
technology.ctaSubtitle: Get sandbox access and start building with our exchange APIs today.

liquidity.heroSubtitle: Deep order books, transparent fees, and performance infrastructure for professional market makers.
liquidity.feeSubtitle: Clear maker/taker fees with volume tiers and performance incentives.
liquidity.feeTransparentDesc: No hidden costs. Competitive rates designed for professional volume.
liquidity.feeVolumeDesc: Progressive fee reduction as monthly volumes increase.
liquidity.feeIncentiveDesc: Fee rebates and participation incentives for qualifying providers.
liquidity.tierCustomNote: Custom pricing available for qualifying market makers. Contact us for details.
liquidity.infraSubtitle: Built for algorithmic trading, market making, and high-frequency strategies.
liquidity.infraCoLocationDesc: Low-latency connectivity for fastest execution and data delivery.
liquidity.infraLatencyDesc: Consistent performance and fast execution under high volume.
liquidity.incentiveSubtitle: Structured rewards for providers meeting performance benchmarks.
liquidity.incentiveRebatesDesc: Fee rebates based on quoting quality, uptime, and spread metrics.
liquidity.incentiveVolumeDesc: Additional rewards for consistent monthly volume targets.
liquidity.incentiveNetworkDesc: Equity participation for qualifying infrastructure partners.
liquidity.partnerDesc: Join our network for preferential fees, dedicated support, and co-location options.

whiteLabel.heroSubtitle: Fully branded, exchange-grade platform powered by IQEX. Matching engine to settlement — included.
whiteLabel.componentsSubtitle: Complete exchange stack — front-end to settlement — fully managed.
whiteLabel.compBrandedUIDesc: Your brand identity across the full trading interface — logo, colours, and domain.
whiteLabel.compRiskDesc: Position monitoring, market controls, and operational risk tools — out of the box.
whiteLabel.compSettlementDesc: Automated multi-currency settlement with real-time reconciliation.
whiteLabel.compCommissionDesc: Configurable commission models and transparent revenue sharing.
whiteLabel.deploySubtitle: Structured process for a smooth, predictable launch.
whiteLabel.step1Desc: Define scope, markets, branding, and commercial structure.
whiteLabel.step2Desc: Platform setup, branding, risk parameters, and API integration.

whiteLabel.integrationSubtitle: Connect IQEX with your existing infrastructure.
whiteLabel.intApiDesc: Full gRPC API access for your systems and workflows.
whiteLabel.intDashboardDesc: Back-office tools for user management, market config, and operations.
whiteLabel.intReportingDesc: Live dashboards for volumes, P&L, customer activity, and risk.
whiteLabel.partnersSubtitle: Regional operator, sports community, or Web3 platform — IQEX gives you the infrastructure to compete.

whiteLabel.partnerAffiliatesDesc: Turn your audience into active traders under your brand.
whiteLabel.partnerSportsDesc: Professional prediction markets tailored to your community.
whiteLabel.partnerCryptoDesc: Sports trading with stablecoin integration and hybrid settlement.
whiteLabel.whySubtitle: Live exchange infrastructure backed by institutional-grade technology.
whiteLabel.whyItem1: No development team required — fully managed platform

markets.heroSubtitle: Institutional-depth markets in cricket, football, tennis, and custom verticals.
markets.sportsSubtitle: Deep coverage across the world's most traded sports with full in-play support.
markets.capSubtitle: Core capabilities powering every market on the IQEX platform.
markets.capInPlayDesc: Sub-second updates with automated suspension during live events.
markets.capTypesDesc: From match winner to complex session markets — diverse strategies supported.

markets.capCustomDesc: Bespoke markets for prediction events, political outcomes, and niche verticals.
markets.capPricingDesc: Algorithmic prices with real-time adjustment from market activity and data feeds.
markets.capMultiOpDesc: Shared infrastructure serves multiple white-label operators with isolated risk.

markets.customPredictionDesc: Event-driven markets for outcomes beyond traditional sports.

markets.customEntertainmentDesc: Awards, reality TV, and cultural event markets.
markets.customEsportsDesc: Competitive gaming markets across major titles and tournaments.
markets.customNicheDesc: Kabaddi, table tennis, darts, and emerging sports coverage.

compliance.heroSubtitle: Regulatory rigour built for institutional-grade market infrastructure.
compliance.pillarJurisdictionDesc: Multi-jurisdictional framework with localised compliance and global operational standards.
compliance.pillarKycDesc: Identity verification and AML protocols at every layer, tiered by risk.
compliance.pillarSurveillanceDesc: Real-time detection of manipulation with automated alerts for compliance teams.
compliance.pillarResponsibleDesc: Exposure limits, cooling-off, and self-exclusion tools for regulated markets.
compliance.capSubtitle: Integrated tools for regulatory adherence across all operations.
compliance.capMonitoringDesc: Automated screening of all transactions against sanctions and PEP databases.
compliance.capSarDesc: SAR workflows with escalation protocols and regulatory filing support.
compliance.capMultiJurisDesc: Per-jurisdiction rules with geo-fencing and localised reporting.
compliance.capDataProtectionDesc: GDPR-compliant handling with encryption and data residency controls.
compliance.capAuditDesc: Immutable audit logs with regulatory-ready reporting.
compliance.capIdentityDesc: Multi-tier KYC with document, biometric, and ongoing due diligence.
compliance.commitSubtitle: Operating at the highest standards of compliance and market integrity.
compliance.commitDesc: Strong compliance is a competitive advantage. Partners choose IQEX for governance, security, and regulatory posture.
compliance.commit1: Licensed or licensable framework across target jurisdictions
compliance.commit2: Independent security audits and penetration testing
compliance.commit3: Regular compliance programme reviews and updates
compliance.commit4: Dedicated compliance officer and regulatory liaison
compliance.commit5: Staff training on AML, responsible trading, and data protection
compliance.commit6: Transparent reporting to regulators and operators
compliance.commit7: Cooperation with law enforcement and integrity bodies
compliance.commit8: Continuous improvement based on regulatory developments
compliance.ctaSubtitle: For regulatory questions, compliance documentation, or partnership discussions.

web3.heroSubtitle: Bridge traditional finance and crypto with institutional-grade settlement infrastructure. Stablecoin deposits, fast global settlement, and optional on-chain transparency.
web3.infraSubtitle: Purpose-built settlement layer that combines the speed of crypto with the reliability of traditional finance.
web3.featureStablecoinDesc: Accept and settle in USDT, USDC, and other major stablecoins. Fast onboarding with global reach and minimal friction.
web3.featureSettlementDesc: Near-instant settlement across borders without traditional banking delays. 24/7 availability with finality guarantees.
web3.featureCustodyDesc: Enterprise security controls with multi-signature wallets, cold storage, and comprehensive audit trails for institutional compliance.
web3.featureTransparencyDesc: Provable fairness with optional on-chain settlement records. Verifiable market outcomes without compromising performance.
web3.archSubtitle: Our hybrid payment architecture provides the flexibility operators need while maintaining the security institutions demand.
web3.archItem1: Unified settlement API for fiat and crypto
web3.benefitsSubtitle: Combine the best of traditional and crypto payment infrastructure.
web3.benefitMultiCurrencyDesc: Fiat and crypto rails in a unified settlement layer. Operators choose their preferred payment mix.
web3.benefitBorderlessDesc: Reach traders globally without complex banking integrations. Crypto-native onboarding for underserved markets.
web3.benefitCompliantDesc: Built with compliance-first design. KYC/AML integration, transaction monitoring, and jurisdictional controls.
web3.benefitHybridDesc: Best of both worlds - traditional fiat processing combined with Web3 settlement where it adds value.
web3.ctaSubtitle: Connect with our team to explore stablecoin settlement and hybrid payment infrastructure.

privacyPolicy.heroSubtitle: How IQEX Exchange collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacyPolicy.section1Item1: Account information: name, email address, company name, and contact details provided during registration or enquiry.
privacyPolicy.section1Item2: Technical data: IP address, browser type, device identifiers, and access timestamps collected automatically when you use our services.
privacyPolicy.section1Item3: Transaction data: order history, trade records, and settlement information generated through platform usage.
privacyPolicy.section1Item4: Communications: records of correspondence when you contact our support or partnership teams.
privacyPolicy.section2Item1: Provide, operate, and maintain our exchange infrastructure and API services.
privacyPolicy.section2Item2: Process transactions, manage accounts, and facilitate settlement.
privacyPolicy.section2Item3: Comply with legal obligations including KYC, AML, and regulatory reporting requirements.
privacyPolicy.section2Item4: Communicate service updates, security alerts, and operational notifications.
privacyPolicy.section2Item5: Improve platform performance, security, and user experience through analytics.
privacyPolicy.section3Item1: We do not sell personal data to third parties.
privacyPolicy.section3Item2: Data may be shared with regulated service providers (identity verification, payment processing) under strict contractual controls.
privacyPolicy.section3Item3: We may disclose information when required by law, regulation, or valid legal process.
privacyPolicy.section3Item4: Aggregated, anonymised data may be used for analytics and reporting purposes.
privacyPolicy.section4Item1: Industry-standard encryption (TLS 1.3) for all data in transit.
privacyPolicy.section4Item2: Encrypted storage with access controls and audit logging for data at rest.
privacyPolicy.section4Item3: Regular security assessments, penetration testing, and infrastructure audits.
privacyPolicy.section4Item4: Role-based access controls limiting personnel access to personal data.
privacyPolicy.section5Item1: Account data is retained for the duration of your relationship with IQEX and as required by applicable regulations.
privacyPolicy.section5Item2: Transaction records are retained for the minimum period required by financial regulatory obligations.
privacyPolicy.section5Item3: You may request deletion of personal data subject to our legal and regulatory retention requirements.
privacyPolicy.section6Item1: Access: request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
privacyPolicy.section6Item2: Correction: request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacyPolicy.section6Item3: Deletion: request deletion of your data, subject to regulatory requirements.
privacyPolicy.section6Item4: Portability: request your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacyPolicy.section6Item5: To exercise any of these rights, contact privacy@iqex.io.
privacyPolicy.section7Item1: We use essential cookies required for platform functionality and session management.
privacyPolicy.section7Item2: Analytics cookies may be used to understand usage patterns and improve our services.
privacyPolicy.section7Item3: You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacyPolicy.section8Item1: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or platform notification.
privacyPolicy.section8Item2: Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPolicy.contactPrefix: For privacy-related enquiries, contact us at

terms.heroSubtitle: The terms governing your use of IQEX Exchange services and infrastructure.
terms.section1Item1: By accessing or using IQEX Exchange services, APIs, or platform infrastructure, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
terms.section1Item2: If you are using our services on behalf of an organisation, you represent that you have authority to bind that organisation to these terms.
terms.section1Item3: If you do not agree, you must not access or use our services.
terms.section2Item1: IQEX provides exchange infrastructure, matching engine technology, gRPC API access, and white-label platform solutions for sports trading markets.
terms.section2Item2: Services are provided on an "as available" basis. We target 99.9% uptime but do not guarantee uninterrupted access.
terms.section2Item3: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service with reasonable notice.
terms.section3Item1: You must be of legal age in your jurisdiction and not prohibited from using our services under applicable law.
terms.section3Item2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your API credentials and account access.
terms.section3Item3: You must complete all required KYC/AML verification procedures before accessing trading functionality.
terms.section3Item4: You agree to provide accurate, current information and to update it promptly if it changes.
terms.section4Item1: You shall not use our services for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable regulation.
terms.section4Item2: Market manipulation, spoofing, layering, or any form of abusive trading conduct is strictly prohibited.
terms.section4Item3: You shall not attempt to disrupt, overload, or compromise the integrity of our systems or infrastructure.
terms.section4Item4: Reverse engineering, decompiling, or attempting to extract source code from our platform is prohibited.
terms.section5Item1: Fee schedules are published on our platform and may vary by account tier and volume.
terms.section5Item2: We reserve the right to modify fee structures with prior notice to affected parties.
terms.section5Item3: Settlement is processed according to the rules and timelines specified for each market type.
terms.section5Item4: You are responsible for any taxes arising from your use of our services.
terms.section6Item1: All platform technology, APIs, documentation, and branding are the property of IQEX Exchange or its licensors.
terms.section6Item2: White-label partners receive a limited licence to use IQEX technology as specified in their partnership agreement.
terms.section6Item3: No rights are granted beyond what is expressly stated in these terms or a separate written agreement.
terms.section7Item1: IQEX Exchange shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our services.
terms.section7Item2: Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the fees paid by you in the twelve months preceding the claim.
terms.section7Item3: We are not liable for losses resulting from market movements, system outages beyond our reasonable control, or third-party service failures.
terms.section8Item1: You agree to indemnify and hold IQEX Exchange harmless from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your breach of these terms or misuse of our services.
terms.section9Item1: Either party may terminate the relationship with written notice as specified in the applicable service agreement.
terms.section9Item2: We may suspend or terminate access immediately if we reasonably believe you have violated these terms or applicable law.
terms.section9Item3: Upon termination, outstanding settlement obligations remain enforceable.
terms.section10Item1: These terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales.
terms.section10Item2: Any disputes shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation, followed by binding arbitration if necessary.
terms.section10Item3: Nothing in these terms limits your rights under mandatory consumer protection laws in your jurisdiction.
terms.section11Item1: We may update these terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated with at least 30 days' notice.
terms.section11Item2: Continued use of our services after the effective date of changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.contactPrefix: For questions about these terms, contact us at
